channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 250,000 — Neat & Versatile 3-Bedroom Home in Suburbs (Suburbs, Bulawayo East)
item.description: USD 250,000 — Suburbs, Bulawayo East. 3 beds, 2 baths. Neat & Versatile 3-Bedroom Home in Suburbs. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
